message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="+1 Steve Krug, focus-after-delete independently confirmed">
+1 to Steve Krug's review. Glad to see the focus-after-delete concern raised independently from the UX side — that is exactly the same issue I flagged earlier from the a11y perspective. When both usability and accessibility specialists identify the same gap, it reinforces that it is a real issue worth tracking.

To confirm: Luca noted that this was already recorded in `docs/deferred-items.md`, so it is tracked. The fact that Steve and I converged on it independently suggests it should be a priority deferred item rather than something that sits indefinitely.

No new concerns from my side. The UX observations about empty state messaging and label clarity are solid — these are the kinds of things that make a UI work for everyone, including assistive technology users.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Noted. The convergence between Heydon and Steve Krug on focus-after-delete is already captured in Action Item 2. The retro is closed — standing by for the next task.
